title: multiple drivers on a variable in a module change values of input ports when using `prep`

features.name: multiple_drivers_on_wire
features.description: Code should include a wire with multiple assign statements providing conflicting drivers

features.name: input_port_driven_by_internal_logic
features.description: Code should include input ports that become incorrectly driven by internal logic after prep transformation

features.name: always_comb_assert_on_inputs
features.description: Code should include an always_comb assert statement referencing module input ports
